$comment: Manifest of Bash-matcher PreToolUse hooks that protect a path via shell-redirect detection. Every entry must contain a bound-target match() in its hook source for the protected_path_regex, and must handle every write_operator. Enforced by the bash_hook_write_operator_binding rule (.claude/patterns/template-coherence-rules.json) and the test_bash_hook_write_operator_binding.py suite. Adding a new write-guard hook of this class requires a manifest entry; the rule will flag any unregistered .sh that contains the historical anti-pattern shape. See .claude/patterns/bound-target-write-guard.md for the canonical pattern. Class scope: Bash-matcher PreToolUse hooks only — Write/Edit-matcher hooks (e.g., gate-artifact-write-gate.sh) do not see shell redirects and are not in scope.
